prestazioni: SR20DET (blacktop or redtop variant) forged internals: Tomei 87mm forged pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, ACL race bearings, and Tomei Type-S head gasket for 1.5mm squish clearance, supporting 1.3+ bar boost on E85
Turbocharger: Garrett GTX3076R Gen II with .82 A/R turbine housing, 58mm billet compressor wheel, and TiAL MV-R 44mm external wastegate for precise boost control up to 28psi

Fuel system: Injector Dynamics ID1700x injectors, Walbro 450LPH in-tank pump, Tomei high-flow fuel rail, and AEM 340LPH inline pump with -8AN feed/return lines, paired with a Tomei 260° camshaft set and Tomei adjustable cam gears for optimized overlap
ECU: Haltech Elite 2500 standalone with flex-fuel sensor, 4D ignition tables, and individual cylinder trimming for the SR20DET, mapped by a specialist like Rywire or Enjuku Racing for 450+ whp on E85

Drivetrain: OS Giken Super Lock LSD with 2.5-way differential, Nismo 5-speed close-ratio gearbox (JDM S15 spec), and N1 4.444 final drive for aggressive acceleration, paired with a Tilton twin-disc clutch and lightweight flywheel

Suspension: Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers with 8kg/mm front and 10kg/mm rear springs, Cusco front and rear sway bars (22mm front, 18mm rear), and Whiteline adjustable rear toe arms for aggressive rotation

Braking: Endless 6-pot front calipers with 330mm two-piece rotors and Ferodo DS2500 pads, paired with Endless 4-pot rear calipers and 300mm rotors, with braided stainless steel lines and Motul RBF660 brake fluid
estetica: Body kit: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody conversion with carbon fiber overfenders, front bumper, and rear diffuser, retaining the OEM S14 chassis but widening the track by 50mm per side for aggressive stance

Aero: Voltex Type-3 rear wing with 3D carbon fiber construction, adjustable angle mounts, and integrated third brake light, paired with a Cusco front lip spoiler and carbon fiber canards for high-speed stability
Wheels: Work Meister S1 3P 17x9.5 +15 front and 17x10.5 +22 rear in matte gunmetal, paired with Nitto NT01 245/40/17 and 275/35/17 tires for optimal grip and weight reduction (15.5 lbs per wheel)

Interior: Bride Zeta III reclining bucket seats with Takata 4-point harnesses, NRG quick-release steering wheel hub, and Defi BF gauges (oil pressure, boost, water temp, and fuel pressure) mounted in a custom carbon fiber A-pillar pod
Lighting: Hella Micro DE fog lights with custom HID projectors, retrofitted with Osram Night Breaker Laser bulbs, and JDM S15-spec clear taillights with sequential LED turn signals

Exterior details: Seibon carbon fiber hood with integrated NACA duct for intercooler cooling, Cusco carbon fiber mirror covers, and a custom 3M matte vinyl wrap in Nissan Racing Blue (KH3) with gloss black accents
